one_line_verdict: A thoughtful drama for history buffs and faith-curious viewers — best saved for a comfortable streaming night rather than a pricey theater outing.
english_note: 18th-century theological rhetoric, period-accurate diction, and sermonic speeches may challenge non-native English speakers.
credits_detail: No post-credits scene expected — typical of prestige historical dramas of this style. (Speculative)
one_line_summary: Faith, friendship, and fire — the unlikely bond that helped shape a nation's soul.
